feature1_default_configuration.json.description: Reads configuration when no supported environment variables are provided and reports the complete default tracing configuration.

cases.expected_output:
trace_enabled=true
load_at_startup=true
traces_exporter=otlp
otlp_protocol=http/protobuf
console_exporter_enabled=true
enabled_instrumentations=
tracer_plugins=
activity_sources=default_activity_source
legacy_sources=
integrations_available=true
http2_unencrypted_support=false

feature2_trace_exporter_selection.json.description: Selects the trace export destination from a supported environment value while leaving unrelated configuration at defaults.

cases.expected_output:
trace_enabled=true
load_at_startup=true
traces_exporter=none
otlp_protocol=http/protobuf
console_exporter_enabled=true
enabled_instrumentations=
tracer_plugins=
activity_sources=default_activity_source
legacy_sources=
integrations_available=true
http2_unencrypted_support=false

trace_enabled=true
load_at_startup=true
traces_exporter=zipkin
otlp_protocol=http/protobuf
console_exporter_enabled=true
enabled_instrumentations=
tracer_plugins=
activity_sources=default_activity_source
legacy_sources=
integrations_available=true
http2_unencrypted_support=false

feature3_invalid_trace_exporter.json.description: Rejects an unsupported trace export destination and reports a normalized configuration error with the rejected value.

feature4_otlp_protocol_delegation.json.description: Determines whether the OTLP protocol is explicitly defaulted by the configuration layer or delegated to the exporter implementation.

cases.expected_output:
trace_enabled=true
load_at_startup=true
traces_exporter=otlp
otlp_protocol=http/protobuf
console_exporter_enabled=true
enabled_instrumentations=
tracer_plugins=
activity_sources=default_activity_source
legacy_sources=
integrations_available=true
http2_unencrypted_support=false

trace_enabled=true
load_at_startup=true
traces_exporter=otlp
otlp_protocol=sdk_default
console_exporter_enabled=true
enabled_instrumentations=
tracer_plugins=
activity_sources=default_activity_source
legacy_sources=
integrations_available=true
http2_unencrypted_support=false

feature5_http2_unencrypted_support.json.description: Reads the opt-in switch for unencrypted HTTP/2 support and reports whether the setting is enabled.

cases.expected_output:
trace_enabled=true
load_at_startup=true
traces_exporter=otlp
otlp_protocol=http/protobuf
console_exporter_enabled=true
enabled_instrumentations=
tracer_plugins=
activity_sources=default_activity_source
legacy_sources=
integrations_available=true
http2_unencrypted_support=true

_constraints.input_condition: environment map is empty or does not contain OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER or OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL or OTEL_DOTNET_AUTO_HTTP2UNENCRYPTEDSUPPORT_ENABLED
_constraints.output_rule: Output the complete default configuration snapshot with every line terminated by a newline character.
Output specific lines as part of the baseline configuration block.
When OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER is 'none', override traces_exporter to 'none'. Otherwise, use the provided value.
Support specific valid values for the exporter.
Verbatim output of unsupported values after key=value or error report.
Reject any value not in the supported set and return a normalized error format instead of partial success.

_constraints.input_condition: Environment contains OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL with empty string
_constraints.output_rule: Treat empty string as an explicit default to 'http/protobuf'.

_constraints.input_condition: Environment contains OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL with non-empty, valid value
_constraints.output_rule: Output 'sdk_default' to indicate protocol is to be handled by the exporter implementation.

_constraints.input_condition: Environment lacks OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL or value is null/absent
Environment lacks key, or value is 'false', or value is null/absent
Any configuration line representing an empty array (enabled_instrumentations, tracer_plugins, legacy_sources, etc.)
_constraints.output_rule: Output corresponds to key+sign+empty, no whitespace between equals and newline.
Strictly maintain the following sequence of lines in no matter what input is provided.
Prohibit language-specific exceptions or generic faults. Output strict key=value lines instead.

_constraints.input_condition: System reads from directory containing feature files
_constraints.output_rule: Filename format for deterministic test output is required.
Write to stdout with no headers or footers.
Output namespace is determined by case directory name.
